search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | stats count as "Alert Count"
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename severity as "Severity" | stats count as "Alert Count" by Severity

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename id as "Alert Id", startedAt as "Alert Time" , categoryType as "Category Type", severity as "Severity", description as "Description" | table "Alert Id", "Alert Time","Category Type", "Severity","Description"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id| search id="$row.Alert Id$" startedAt="$row.Alert Time$" categoryType="$row.Category Type$" severity="$row.Severity$" description="$row.Description$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename network.name as "Network Name", severity as "Severity Level" | stats count as "Count" by "Network Name", "Severity Level" | sort - 0 Count

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | search network.name="$row.Network Name$" severity="$row.Severity Level$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename scope.devices{}.name as "Device Name", severity as "Severity Level" | stats count as "Count" by "Device Name", "Severity Level" | sort - 0 Count

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" $orgid$ | dedup id | search scope.devices{}.name="$row.Device Name$" severity="$row.Severity Level$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
